name: Close-Grip Push-Up
shortDescription: A push-up variation with hands close together to emphasize triceps involvement.
instructions: Assume a plank position with hands placed close together under your chest. Lower your body, keeping elbows near your sides, and push back up to the top position.
steps: Begin in a plank position with hands close together under your chest.
Keep your core tight and body in a straight line.
Lower your chest toward the hands, elbows tucked by your sides.
Pause briefly at the bottom without touching the floor.
Press up to the starting position.
breathing: Inhale as you lower down, exhale as you push up.
